(Christian Slater), confront clique leader Heather Chandler (Kim Walker) and accidentally poison her, they make it appear a suicide. Soon Veronica realizes that J.D. is intentionally killing students he does not like. She races to stop J.D. while also clashing with the clique's new leader, Heather Duke (Shannen Doherty).

programme.desc: A burglar holds a knife to Karen's throat while her husband does nothing. The couple ends up befriending the cop that comes. The friendship ends when the cop beats up the culprit. Karen isn't ready to end it. Things get ugly with the cop.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: God of War

programme.desc: Audrey goes to her husband's hometown and learns that her father-in-law passed.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie

programme.desc: Audrey goes to her husband's hometown and learns that her father-in-law passed.

programme.desc: When Emma is hired to bake for a royal cake, she finds herself at odds with a Prince.

programme.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
programme.desc: Locals and the media stand up to authorities when they shut down a girl's lemonade stand.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Grimy Situation
programme.desc: After being arrested at a young age during a drug deal gone wrong and spending part of her youth in prison for the attempted murder of Agent Harris, the now-paroled 30-year-old Camille Sanders has to find a way to make money without turning back to a life of crime and violating her parole. Struggling to survive with no source of income coming in, Camille's forced to live a double life to make ends meet while convincing her Parole Officer she's been

programme.title: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Jessica is the smartest girl on campus tutoring the most popular football player, Ryan. He is loved by many but he also has a few enemies. After the football team wins the championship game, Ryan decides to throw an after party at his house. When campus police find Ryan’s dead body, multiple people have a motive to want him dead. Will Jessica and her friend uncover the truth before it’s too late?

programme.title: Don't Ever Get Married
programme.desc: Jay, a cynical womanizer, bets his friend he can make his fiancée cheat before their wedding. Confident in his charm, he sets out to seduce her, unaware of the emotional turmoil he'll cause. As his plan spirals, Jay faces the consequences of his actions and the possibility of redemption.

programme.title: Gigalow
programme.desc: Diamond White, a college graduate drowning in debt and raising his younger sister, turns to dancing for survival. After moving to Texas, he joins Midnight, an underground male club, and quickly rises to the top. But as money and temptation pull him deeper, Diamond must choose between responsibility and a lifestyle that could cost him everything.

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Giant Octopus
programme.desc: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures.

programme.title: Planetquake
programme.desc: A team of leading seismologists must stop a series of earthquakes before it breaks apart the Earth.

programme.title: Mega Piranha
programme.desc: A mutant strain of giant ferocious piranha escape from the Amazon and eat their way toward Florida.

programme.title: War of the Worlds 2: The Next Wave
programme.desc: The aliens return to complete their plan of human domination, launching a second attack to destroy humanity.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm
programme.desc: Fairytale princesses are taken to Earth by Rumpelstiltskin. Now they must fight to save the planet from him.

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: A spacecraft lands in New York and heads toward our Capital. If it arrives, it will trigger an invasion.

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira is put through the ringer, and hung out to dry, after sitting through this movie. She should have quit while she was a head!

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira's couch is infested with pesky little critters who are clearly Gremlin rejects. The only way she's gonna get rid of them is to endure this flick.

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira is no stranger to man-eating women, but she may have bit off more than she can chew in this indigestible entree, staring Adrianne. Barbau, Shannon Tweed, and Bill Maher whos still trying to live this turkey down.

programme.title: The Changeling
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: Kandisha
programme.desc: Three childhood friends invoke the spirit of a vengeful creature in a game that turns into a living nightmare after their loved ones begin to disappear.

programme.title: Baskin
programme.desc: Five cops stumble upon the blood-spattered bowels of Hell where dark rituals and unspeakable horrors await in this head-spinning freak-out.

programme.title: Leap of Faith: William Friedkin on The Exorcist
programme.desc: Leap of Faith: William Friedkin on The Exorcist

programme.title: The Cellar
programme.desc: About a week after the Woods family move in to Xaos House, their daughter Ellie goes missing during a power cut. The odd thing is, that she was on the phone to her mother Keira at the time, counting down the ten steps into the cellar to find the fuse box. Frustrated by the lack of leads, Keira investigates and finds that the walls have strange symbols engraved into them. After a number of terrifying supernatural experiences, she comes to the conclusion that the house took Ellie. She discovers that a physicist and occultist called John Fetherston, who was obsessed with finding the 11th dimension, built the house and engraved sinister equations on the 10 steps leading into the cellar. Finally, she must battle with the universe's most ancient evil, or lose her family's souls forever.

programme.title: A Dark Song
programme.desc: A heartbroken woman and recluse occultist perform an ancient, dark ritual to bring her child back to life - but missteps have consequences and unknown evils are unleashed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying stunts of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every driver—including fan favorites like Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Armando Castro in El Toro Loco—pushes their 12,000-pound machine to the limit. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly attempts to make a viral "Croffle" (croissant waffle) out of puff pastry, but chaos ensues when he messes up the first try. Pivoting quickly, he serves it up as a warm dessert with ice cream and chocolate syrup. The hosts hilariously discuss the realities of aging and male menopause.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest chef Christian Petroni brings his energy to the kitchen to cook Rigatoni Alla Vodka except he swaps the vodka for red wine. The crew debates "sauce versus gravy," discusses the proper saltiness of pasta water, and reveals the foods they absolutely despise. The episode ends with a giveaway of Christian's cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick recounts the first time a group of friends treated him to his first American breakfast and the influence it had on him as a chef. Dishes include: Eggs Benedict "Stellino Style" / Poached Eggs over Chorizo Hash with Tequila Sauce / Chocolate Chip Pancakes.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino tells us about the time his parents visited him in America and he brought them to a Steak House with a surprising menu choice from his late father. Dishes include: Reverse Sear Steak with Port Wine Sauce and Pan Fried Mushroom and Arugula / Wedge Salad.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick shares with us the importance of Sundays and how the day and certain dishes remind him of his family in Sicily. Dishes include: Potatoes with Sun Dried Tomatoes and Rosemary / Pork Chop with Pizzaiola Sauce / Pasta Agghiu e Ogghiu (Pasta with Garlic and Olive Oil).

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: The second-largest Greek island and an hour from Athens, Diane heads out in search of mushrooms with a local mushroom forager and cultivator. They cook a favorite local recipe "kritharoto," mushrooms with orzo. Diane makes three delectable dishes with mushrooms, wine and local ingrediants, inspired by the flavors of this nearby "secret" land.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates Medieval Irish corned beef and cabbage from *The Vision of Mac Con Glinne* (c. 1100) with onion-leek pottage. He explores Ireland’s rigid food hierarchy—peasants ate grains and salted meat, butter signified wealth, monks preferred game, nobles had fresh meat—and cultural practices like fosterage, the 7-year child-rearing system, and a satirical poem about King Cathal’s gluttony.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max reveals that sugar plums are sugar-coated confections, not fruit, tracing their history from 1600s England to the Victorian era, including use as medicine and cannonball names. He recreates an 1865 cherry sugar plum recipe, showing the 3-day process of drying cherries, coating with gum arabic and sugar syrup, and adding color for the final treat.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores lighthouse keeper life via an 1881 provisioning list and period recipes. He covers the isolated, demanding job—cleaning Fresnel lenses with mercury, trimming wicks, and cooking with limited supplies like flour, beans, and salt pork. Featuring keepers Henry Long, Mary Ryan, and Hannah Thomas, he recreates Fannie Farmer’s 1896 Boston corn chowder with pilot bread.

programme.desc: Season 2 premiere. Mar Jennings, known as America's Top Lifestyle Expert, is ready to renovate all the homes on his Westport, CT street. programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season premiere part 2. Mar began a huge addition on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. But at the beginning of the dining and den walkthrough the homeowners were unreadable. Tune in to see if they will approve of Mar's progress and designs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Master bedrooms and baths are things that dreams are made of until some nightmare hiccups happen. Turns out that visiting Broadway show sets provides unexpected inspiration. Amid creating the serene décor, Mar also finds a practical way to hide a litter box, and his team takes bets on which design his fans vote for.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The holidays are in full swing on Mar's. Join America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his home makeover team as they enjoy Westport CT during the holidays with activities like caroling, sleigh rides, shopping and more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT mid-century bungalow picks up steam and the change is amazing. America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his team love seeing their plans come to life. And when it's a hands-on project, Mar can't resist being inspired by his favorite '70's bionic TV heroes.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Bungalow transformation is complete and ready to reveal. It's down to the wire on finishing this home in time for an open house. Yvonne and Mar have overseen all the construction and renovation, but now there's a rush to finish the staging.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT street comes to a halt when Mar's own home suffers some unexpected damage. But that means an all-new kitchen. Team Mar may not be able to cope with this one, especially when the project seems to keep on growing.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After a water leak forced Mar to make an emergency renovation to his own kitchen, work began with a design palette all inspired by a fish. Now Mar is ready to finish it up, but takes a break to throw out the first pitch at a game. Hopefully his aim will be true.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: All the worlds a stage when you're an amazing home stager. Watch a gorgeous new construction get staged to sell as only Mar can do it. This home references the past, and time travel is definitely a theme.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: You’ve seen them advertised on TV, now find out if they really work! We put eight popular TV infomercial products for your home to the test to see if they actually live up to their claims.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Fall is a great time to work in your yard, but it’s important to know what projects to tackle and avoid as cold weather approaches.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Scotland: Beginning in Glasgow, Tony experiences the heart-clogging glory of deep fried pizza, deep fried mars bars, and deep fried pickled eggs! Moving on to more traditional fare, Tony tastes haggis and learns to hunt and fish for his food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: London, England: In London, Tony attempts to dispel the myth that all English food is disgusting and over-boiled. Tony tries Nose to Tail Eating, explores traditional fare at Pie and Mash Shoppes, and then visits a predominantly Indian community.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In the Caribbean paradise of St. Martin, Tony eats a healthy Rastafarian meal with a freedom fighter, helps prepare grub for a food caravan, discovers foodstuffs not available at American supermarkets, and finally relaxes at a beach bar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony catches a Bayou alligator, cools off with a world-famous snow cone, gets in trouble with the law, eats jambalaya with a dancing chef, and relaxes to some local jazz.

programme.title: Tastes Like Home
programme.desc: Catherine travels to Osijek where she soaks in the local culture before learning how to prepare Croatian Sarma, a dish the Matkovic family is hoping she will pass along to them so they may create and savor their own tastes from home.

programme.title: Savour Australia
programme.desc: Jason experiences Brisbane, a city with a beautiful Public Art Trail, and he also travels to Noosa to enjoy its Night Markets. Acclaimed chef Peter Kuruvita then teaches Jason how to cook a classic Sri Lankan dish.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy's iconic first dish is Crispy Belly Pork. In the classroom Joe Swash creates Veggie Singapore Noodles. Jeremy then makes Tea Smoked Duck and Pancakes, followed by a Macanese Egg Tart, the perfect accompaniment for a cup of tea.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Messinia, Diane visits with a good friend who helps her discover the secrets of this rich, giving land that is blessed with a perfect climate. The region is home to the world's first system of culinary provenance, and delicious recipes.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: In Chianti, we celebrate true Chianti at Castello di Ama, and at Busatti in Anghiari, 100-year-old looms craft fine fabrics. We will also hunt wild boar and meet butcher Dario Cecchini in Panzano, and ride with the butteri in Maremma.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Beginning in the awe-inspiring Dingle Peninsula, Mickela dances with David Geaney, goes on a walking food tour of Dingle, sits in on a trad session with SuperCeili at The Dingle Music Shop, and is then taught the brush dance in Killarney.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: From Israeli folk dance at the 92Y to eating knishes in the Lower East Side, Mickela spends some quality time getting to know one of New York's most cultural and religiously pious populations.

programme.title: Family Travel with Colleen Kelly
programme.desc: The MSC Seaside offers a multigenerational Caribbean experience. The Kellys take advantage of all the fun activities the cruise offers, and they explore the rich culture of the Caribbean islands as well, including a fun stop in Jamaica.

programme.title: Family Travel with Colleen Kelly
programme.desc: Colleen's family embarks on a journey through Ireland's Wild Atlantic Way where they zipline through the Delphi Forest, meet birds of prey at Dromoland Castle, herd sheep at Glen Keen Farm, enjoy afternoon tea, and go fly fishing.

programme.title: Secrets of the National Parks
programme.desc: Get "a touch of the tundra" as you take in Denali's stunning scenery through the dome-roofed cars of the Denali Star train, meet sled dogs at the Kennels, and take a discovery hike to experience the untamed wilderness and diverse wildlife much as the first explorers to the region once did.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash 2
programme.desc: All new episodes with brand new vehicles taking trip through Carl’s fantastic car wash! Big rigs, bull dozers!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Jett delivers a toy vacuum cleaner to a boy in Switzerland Donnie modifies it to be "bigger and better". But the new vacuum is too powerful and gets away. When World Airport Delivery Depot manager Neo's drones replace the Super Wings, one delivers an empty package to a girl in South Korea. Jett finds what she ordered in Donnie's hangar... but the drones won't give it up!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a wedding ring to a boy named Christo whose Dad is getting married. Trouble arises when a pelican snatches the ring. Jett delivers a tree tap and bucket to a girl in Quebec. But one tap can't produce enough sap to make the maple candies Manon wants to bring to a maple syrup festival. Donnie's Build-It Buddies bring all the gear needed, but a syrupy spill causes a major roadblock.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a sticker book to a boy named Victor in Mexico whose Mom has a plan: if Victor earns 10 stickers by doing 10 chores, she'll give him a big reward. Jett and the Build-it Buddies come up with an elaborate plan to help rush a crop of small, unripe kiwifruit to market. But the kiwifruit grow too big too fast, and cause a giant kiwifruit avalanche.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a costume to a boy named Nav in Abu Dhabi for an Air Show competition.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy deliver a package of harmless hair dyes and a grooming kit to a girl named Olenca in Cusco, Peru. Olenca wants to dye her pet alpacas with pretty colors. However, the animals don't like the process, panic, and run away. When a girl in Guangzhou, China brings her cat to a famous festival of lights in Huacheng Square, the cat takes off, chasing after at the light show's laser beams.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie head for Montgomery, Alabama in America where they join a boy named Kevin and his Dad on Fathers' Day at a car factory to build a car! But the Super Wings need to save the car and the factory from total destruction. When a girl named Cynthia in Yaounde, Cameroon, asks for a toy train for her baby chimp to ride on, things get dodgy fast. Kimba, the chimp, takes off into the jungle.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie head for Roros, Norway to deliver a dress that shoots pretend snow. It's for a girl named Alice who is starring in the play "The Snow Princess". But a snowstorm threatens to cancel the play! Jett and Paul head to Saint Gallen, Switzerland to deliver a gingerbread man costume. It's for a boy named Teri who wants to use it to cheer on his pet pig, Otto, in a pig race.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Mira fly to San Cristobal, Ecuador to deliver super strong bubble solution. It's for a boy who wants to blow super strong bubbles that will last and last. But the bubbles trap sea animals and float them away! When a girl named Sylviya asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria. This leads to an encounter with bees and a new Super Wing named Bucky.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Gio asks the Super Wings to build him a special suit to wear to the local Mud Festival that will protect him from getting muddy. When the suit goes haywire Jett and the Super Wings come to the rescue. A young boy in Denmark orders egg capsules to hold three baby "block" dinosaurs he invented. But the eggs hatch early and imprint on Jett.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy in the Australian Outback wants to see a U.F.O. and meet an alien. He orders a mini satellite which unexpectedly leads to a rescue mission. Jett and Mira fly to Amphawa, Thailand, and deliver an enormous cake to a boy named Phra. They transport the cake on a raft through a floating market, but its fruit toppings attract the attention of some hungry Thai wildlife.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl who lives in the Netherlands asks for a tiny dress, a 'Dream Dress". When Jett and Bucky arrive, Nina tells them that she hopes it won't get taken, as a lot of things have been disappearing from her doll house lately. A girl on Easter Island asks for giant propeller caps for the Moai statues near her home. But the wind picks up and turns the Moai into head-helicopters.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A Scottish boy named Rooney asks the Super Wings to create a special mega-sized soccer uniform for his friend Jack, who is a tractor. Jack needs the uniform for an upcoming match of Tractor Soccer. A boy in Hawaii orders a special vacuum to clean up the garbage he's found in a bay where he rescued a young sea turtle. Before releasing the turtle, they discover a massive garbage island.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett's friend from Japan, Namiko, orders enormous sheets of origami paper. She and her friends use them for the Paper Rangers fan convention. But an animatronic of Paper Rangers' enemy Drac the Ripper goes haywire. Jett and Donnie deliver special tires to a boy named Gaspard in the Gobi Desert. Enjo gets overconfident with the new tires and accidentally startles some sheep.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: World Aircraft is flying through the Himalayas when an order comes in from a house near Mt Everest. Jett and Dizzy are sent to deliver some mega-sized art supplies to two brothers who want to make a mega-sized "Good Luck" card for their Dad. He's about to climb Mt. Everest! But when World Aircraft gets into trouble and crashes, it's going to take more than a Supercharge to save it!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks for a spray-painting drone. When her jealous little dog steals the controls causing the drone to paint the town, they must get it back before he makes a huge mess. Jett and Donnie travel to Germany to bring a long wig to a girl named Kirsten. She wants to dress up as the famous princess, Rapunzel. Kirsten learns that it takes more than a wig to be a princess.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Switzerland orders an early release copy of a new book by a teenage adventure author. Discovering that the last chapter is missing, the Super Wings help her find the author. A boy named Pavel whose hobby is repairing watches, orders a special Super Wings wristwatch. Pavel takes them to see the Astronomy Clock in the Old Town Square, but they discover the old clock has stopped.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a boy and his grandmother board a luxury train in South Africa with self-inflating balloons, some animals cause the balloons to inflate, sending the train up into the sky. A girl named Kate from Bunbury, Australia, asks for a scanner that can go underwater. Jett and Mira learn that Kate needs it to analyze her favorite dolphin, Ninotchka. But Ninotchaka takes off after an undersea earthquake.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On Halloween, a boy in California orders his own fully-functional Super Wings costume. But a haunted house scares Donnie haywire and he gets a giant pumpkin decoration stuck on his head! Jett and Paul fly to Cairo, where a girl has ordered a special item to help her lead a tour of the Cairo Museum for her friends. But the girl's little brother accidentally brings the mummies and sphinx to life!

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Colors Song Kids Learning Videos
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Farmees as they sing, dance in this fun kids learning video. Learn about Colors, alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool nursery rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Ben The Train Kids Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Enjoy Farmees Humpty Dumpty and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Wheels on the bus Nursery Rhyme and Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes which children love. Learn songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Car Wash for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: The most popular car wash videos all in one place! This compilation features a wide number of vehicles!

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck + More Nursery Rhymes for Kids - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Enjoy Boom Buddies nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, including Baby Shark, Fruits Song, and more!

programme.title: Top 50 Nursery Rhymes Collection - Kids TV
programme.desc: Enjoy the Top 50 nursery rhymes by Kids TV. Babies will learn preschool songs with their favorite characters.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables; his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: The Portillo Expedition: Mystery on the Bougainville Island
programme.desc: THE PORTILLO EXPEDITION: MYSTERY ON BOUGAINVILLE ISLAND examines the circumstances surrounding the death of Isoroku Yamamoto the Japanese WWII Admiral who planned the Pearl Harbor surprise attack and the Battle at Midway. Admiral Yamamotos plane, the Betty Bomber, was shot down by American P-38 fighter planes in 1943. Narrated by Gary Sinise, the documentary follows a crew of American explorers to the remote jungle of the western Solomon Islands, where they search for the wreck of the Betty Bomber sparking a further quest to understand what they find there.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 1968, one of the largest audiences in television history tuned in to an extraordinary sight: a live telecast of the moon's surface as seen from Apollo 8, the first manned space flight to leave Earth's gravitational pull and orbit the moon. The historic journey captivated people around the world.As this documentary reveals, however, the mission's success was far from assured. The Apollo 8 astronauts had just four months to prepare for the risky lunar orbit, and catastrophic failure would have brought a halt to America's goal of putting a man on the moon before the end of the decade.This film recounts the flight many consider to be NASA's most daring and important. Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists take viewers inside the high-stakes space race of the late 1960s to reveal how a bold decision by NASA administrators put a struggling Apollo program back on track and allowed America to reach the moon before the Soviets.

programme.title: Women Outward Bound
programme.desc: A young girl today might have a hard time believing there was a time when girls were not supposed to do what boys were doing. To them, it's normal to compete in sports, be strong, and get gritty while enjoying the outdoors. But that wasn't the case in the 1960s, when girls were expected to be delicate, clean and demure, while aspiring to secure a husband and keep house.Yet in 1965, these stereotypes didnt stop 24 adventurous young women from setting out to paddle canoes into the wilderness and live in the woods of Minnesota without any food or shelter, and who in the process, broke barriers.WOMEN OUTWARD BOUND profiles the first group of young women to participate in the rigorous U.S. Outward Bound wilderness school in 1965 and chronicles their experiences in the wild. It also captures how one month in the woods taught them they could do more than they ever thought possible. During their experience, the young women forged a special bond, and at a reunion 47 years later, the group reminisce about the lessons they learned and the memories they made, with some surprising revelations. They didnt realize it at the time, but they were a part of changing the course of history.The documentary takes the viewer on a journey over many decades with rare archival footage, personal diary entries, family home videos, photos and aerial footage of the challenging Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness. In the end, the girls proved that they could always handle the difficult challenges given by naturethey just needed to be given the chance.

programme.title: A Company of Heroes
programme.desc: They were the other Band of Brothers. A Company of Heroes features interviews with many of the men not focused on in the book Band of Brothers by Stephen Ambrose or in the television mini-series by the same name. Never before seen video and photos are also included in this film.

programme.title: 1st to Fight: Pacific War Marines
programme.desc: 1ST TO FIGHT: PACIFIC WAR MARINES tells the story of the brave men of the famed 1st Marine Division the oldest, largest and most decorated division of the U.S. Marine Corps. Narrated by actorJon Seda (HBO's The Pacific and NBC's Chicago P.D.), the film recounts the role of the 1st Marine Division in the United States' first major offensive in the Pacific theater during World War II. In 1942, on the Pacific island of Guadalcanal, Americans faced and defeated the Japanese for the first time in a land battle. The fight was one of the most brutal of the war. The Division went on to fight bloody battles in Cape Gloucester and Peleliu, but their decisive victory at Guadalcanal was one of the turning points of World War II for the Allied powers.

programme.title: Fannie's Last Supper
programme.desc: Join culinary expert Christopher Kimball and his team of test kitchen sleuths as they attempt to recreate an authentic turn-of-the-century 12-course dinner. For two years, Kimball painstakingly researched and tested recipes from The Boston Cooking School Cook Book, written in 1896 by Fannie Farmer. Tracking down unusual ingredients, discovering forgotten techniques and battling a finicky wood stove are just part of the fun as the pressure builds for the crew to pull off a perfectly-orchestrated meal for their distinguished guests.The project required the team, lead by head chef Erin McMurrin, to constantly regulate the heat on a cast-iron wood stove and work in the Victorian-era kitchen without the benefit of modern appliances. The courses they prepare include: rissoles (filled and fried puff pastry), mock turtle soup with fried brain balls, lobster lAmricaine, roast goose with chestnut stuffing and jus, wood-grilled salmon, roast saddle of venison, Canton punch, three molded Victorian jellies and a spectacular French-inspired Mandarin cake.This special details not only the cooking and serving of the dinner itself, but travels back in time to investigate the life of Fannie Farmer and the world of Victorian cooking, including the foods, the cookware, and the kitchens in an effort to connect the present to the past.

programme.title: Since: The Bombing of Pan Am Flight 103
programme.desc: Terrorism is seen as a present-day epidemic, but the families of the 270 victims of Pan Am Flight 103 have lived with it for decades. Bound together by tragedy when a bomb ripped the New York-bound 747 jumbo jet into pieces over Lockerbie, Scotland just before Christmas in 1988, the Flight 103 families faced one traumatic injustice after another. From the early days when an unprepared U.S. government left the relatives to fend for themselves against a greedy, once-iconic airline, to the modern era, when the only man convicted of the crime was set free in a backdoor oil deal with Libyas infamous dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, the families refused to go down without a fight, harnessing the power of the media in their war for truth and justice.SINCE: THE BOMBING OF PAN AM FLIGHT 103 is a feature length documentary that tells the emotional story of some of these first victims of terrorism, who proved that ordinary people can accomplish extraordinary feats in the wake of politically-fueled mass murder.
